allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "E:\\newfolder4\\nx-search" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; if \(!\(Test-Path "E:\\newfolder4\\nx-search"\)\) { "MISSING" } else { "EXISTS" })

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('engines_used:', d.get\('engines_used'\)\); print\('sources:', d.get\('sources'\)\); [print\(r['engine'],r['source'],r['score']\) for r in d['results'][:5]]")

PowerShell(cd "E:\\newfolder4\\nx-search"; $proc = Start-Process -PassThru -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npx" -ArgumentList "vite","--port","3004"; Start-Sleep 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3004" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Server not ready: $_" })

PowerShell($body = '{"query":"python authentication middleware","filters":{},"per_page":20,"page":1}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://neuronx.jagatab.uk/api/search/v2/search" -Method POST -Headers @{"X-API-Key"="Pb1sgxwVOdNq6Xdoqk2vfKhIyNrR97bMFibu8wBqI3s";"Content-Type"="application/json"} -Body $body -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "ai_summary: '$\($r.ai_summary\)'"; Write-Output "related_searches count: $\($r.related_searches.Count\)"; Write-Output "intent: $\($r.intent\) | conf: $\($r.intent_confidence\)"; Write-Output "engines: $\($r.engines_used -join ', '\)"; Write-Output "total: $\($r.total\) | time: $\($r.query_time_ms\)ms"; Write-Output ""; $r.results | Select-Object -First 8 | ForEach-Object { $titleVal = if \($_.title\) { $_.title } else { $_.file_path }; Write-Output "[$\($_.engine\)] $\($_.source\) score:$\($_.score\) | $titleVal" })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('results:', len\(d.get\('results',[]\)\), '| engine0:', d['results'][0]['engine'] if d.get\('results'\) else 'none'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d.get\('total'\)\); print\('results:', len\(d.get\('results',[]\)\)\);print\('time_ms:', d.get\('query_time_ms'\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('OK — total:', d['total'], '| results:', len\(d['results']\), '| time_ms:', round\(d['query_time_ms']\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('web-filter:', len\(d['results']\), 'results,', round\(d['query_time_ms']\), 'ms'\)")
